summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. The hydrated preflight artifact provides live state for 20 of 40 listed PRs; those hydrated PRs are classified independently and conservatively. The remaining 20 listed refs lack hydrated live state in the provided artifact, so they are non-mutating needs_human items rather than close, label, merge, or fix actions.
